incident_type: Homophobic Harassment/Verbal Abuse; Subsequent Online Hate Campaign
victim_identity: Brad Cresswell-Lee (queer man, newsreader for JOY FM)
description: Brad Cresswell-Lee, a newsreader for JOY FM, was left shaken after experiencing a homophobic incident while in JJ Holland Park. Following this, he was targeted with online hate after sharing his initial experience publicly.
